summary:
Thin bank-research window: only 4 of 60 tracked tweets carried a bank/strategist tag. The remaining 56 were Mike Zaccardi's untagged general market-chart feed plus HFI Research and TheChartReport posts with no bank tag, all dropped per filter. No @neilksethi / @neilksethinew posts appeared in this collection cycle.

BofA leads with 2 items: internal card/deposit data showing a very strong June employment gain, followed by a note that unemployment-payment growth in the BofA data declined further into July.

Apollo (Torsten Slok) contributes 1 item questioning what qualifies as an 'AI stock,' flagging ticker $CHAT.

Morgan Stanley contributes 1 item (via @soberlook) drawing a technical analog between $SMH (semiconductors) and $SLV (silver).

**By bank:** BofA 2, Apollo/Slok 1, Morgan Stanley 1.
